content: Good morning! Here's your Monday overview: You have work 9-5 as usual. Eleanor's bi-weekly check-in is overdue (was due March 6). Sarah Chen's monthly catch-up is also overdue. Mochi probably needs feeding. Want me to help you plan anything?
Can you remind me to buy cat food on Saturday?
Done! I've set a reminder for Saturday March 21 to buy cat food. You'll get it at 7:30am as usual.
What do you know about James?

James Ko is a colleague — team lead on the backend team, and he's into rock climbing. You last caught up on March 1st over lunch after a sprint retro. His birthday is coming up on March 22nd, just 6 days away! Want me to set a reminder to get him something?
Yeah good idea, remind me the day before
Set! You'll get a reminder on March 21 to sort a birthday gift for James. Given he's into rock climbing, maybe a chalk bag or a day pass to a climbing gym?

The most recent note is from March 14: "Alice has dentist appointment Thursday 10am." Before that, on March 10: you and Bob discussed the kitchen renovation — he wants new countertops and you'd prefer to keep costs under $3k.
